name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month, the complexity of converting architectural plans into permit application forms causes project delays. We automate this process instead of manual conversion.
problem_solved: Difficulty in converting architectural plans into permit application forms, leading to delays in project initiation.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in converting architectural plans into permit application forms, leading to delays in project initiation.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month, the complexity of converting architectural plans into permit application forms causes project delays. We automate this process instead of manual conversion.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual conversion of plans to forms, which is time-consuming and error-prone.

one_liner: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month, the complexity of converting architectural plans into permit application forms causes project delays. We automate this process instead of manual conversion.
